summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Contact History and Quote-to-Invoice conversion features for CRM Alpha Agency. All backend APIs and frontend UI features are working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 404 'Contact non trouvé' when quote has invalid/deleted contact_id. Some quotes in DB have orphaned contact references.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/contacts/{id}/history - Returns 200 with correct structure
Backend: History response contains quotes, invoices, tasks, opportunities arrays
Backend: History summary contains total_quotes, total_invoices, total_tasks, total_quoted, total_invoiced, total_paid, total_remaining
Backend: History summary calculations are correct (counts match array lengths, totals match sums)
Backend: History for non-existent contact returns 404
Backend: POST /api/quotes/{id}/convert-to-invoice - Creates invoice from quote
Backend: Quote status changes to 'accepté' after conversion
Backend: Invoice created with correct quote_id reference and 'en_attente' status
Backend: Convert non-existent quote returns 404
Frontend: Eye button (Voir) visible on each contact row in Contacts page
Frontend: Contact Detail Sheet opens when Eye button clicked
Frontend: Sheet header shows initials, name, company, status/score badges
Frontend: Sheet shows contact info (email, phone, city, poste)
Frontend: Summary cards display Devis count, Factures count, Payé amount, Dû amount
Frontend: Tabs (Devis, Factures, Tâches, Notes) are clickable and switch content
Frontend: Devis tab shows quote list with number, date, amount, status, PDF button
Frontend: Factures tab shows invoice list with number, date, amount, paid amount, status
Frontend: Tâches tab shows task list with title, description, due date, priority, status
Frontend: Notes tab shows note, infos_sup, budget, project_type fields
Frontend: Facturer button visible only for quotes with 'envoyé' status
Frontend: Facturer button converts quote to invoice and shows success toast
critical_code_review_comments: Some quotes have orphaned contact_id references (contact deleted but quote remains). Consider adding cascade delete or validation.
seed_data_creation: Test contact, quote, invoice, and task created and cleaned up during backend tests. Quote DEV-2025-0004 was sent and converted to invoice FAC-2026-0014 during UI testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contact History feature fully tested. GET /api/contacts/{id}/history returns quotes, invoices, tasks, opportunities with summary calculations. Quote-to-Invoice conversion (POST /api/quotes/{id}/convert-to-invoice) works correctly - changes quote status to 'accepté' and creates invoice with 'en_attente' status. Frontend ContactDetailSheet component displays all history data with tabs. Facturer button only appears for quotes with 'envoyé' status.
